name: Ripe Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and grease a 9x5x3-inch bread pan.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift together all-purpose flour, baking soda, and salt; stir in whole wheat flour. Mix into the creamed mixture.
4. Fold in mashed bananas, vanilla extract, and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake 50 to 60 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a rack. Makes one loaf.
